narrative: AI Engineer with six years of experience at Krutrim, a product‑first company, based in Chennai. The primary driver of the ranking is his strong verified skill depth, reflected in solid work with PyTorch and LlamaIndex. His machine‑learning background and hands‑to‑end use of LlamaIndex map well to the search and retrieval focus of the role, and his product‑company experience suggests he can ship features end‑to‑end. However, his JD‑relevant skill match score is well below the pool average, platform engagement is modest, and there are minor credibility concerns plus an unknown notice period, limiting immediate fit.
